prompt: Write a letter to your landlord complaining about a broken heater.
essayText: Dear Sir/Madam, I am writing to complain about the heater in my apartment which has been broken for three weeks. The heater stopped working on January 15th and I contacted your office twice but nobody came to fix it. My family and I are suffering from cold weather every night. My children cannot sleep well. I am requesting that you send a repairman within 3 days. If the problem is not solved I will take further action. Yours faithfully, Nguyen Van An
